commands: bunx rimraf dist && bunx vite build -c vite.config.node.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.define.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.billing.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.front-component.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.logic-function.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.utils.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.browser.ts
bunx tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --outDir dist --rootDir src && bunx tsc-alias -p tsconfig.lib.json --outDir dist

options.command: bunx rimraf dist && bunx vite build -c vite.config.node.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.define.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.billing.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.front-component.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.logic-function.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.utils.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.browser.ts && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --outDir dist --rootDir src && bunx tsc-alias -p tsconfig.lib.json --outDir dist && bunx rimraf --glob "dist/sdk" "dist/define/**/*.d.ts" "dist/define/**/*.d.ts.map" "dist/billing/**/*.d.ts" "dist/billing/**/*.d.ts.map" "dist/front-component/**/*.d.ts" "dist/front-component/**/*.d.ts.map" "dist/logic-function/**/*.d.ts" "dist/logic-function/**/*.d.ts.map" "dist/utils/**/*.d.ts" "dist/utils/**/*.d.ts.map" && bunx rollup -c rollup.config.sdk-dts.mjs && bunx vite build -c vite.config.node.ts --watch & bunx vite build -c vite.config.define.ts --watch & bunx vite build -c vite.config.billing.ts --watch & bunx vite build -c vite.config.front-component.ts --watch & bunx vite build -c vite.config.logic-function.ts --watch & bunx vite build -c vite.config.utils.ts --watch & bunx vite build -c vite.config.browser.ts --watch
bunx wait-on http://localhost:3000/healthz --timeout 600000 --interval 1000 --log && NODE_ENV=test bunx vitest run --config ./vitest.e2e.config.ts

bunx vite build -c vite.config.define.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.front-component.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.logic-function.ts && bunx vite build -c vite.config.utils.ts && bunx rollup -c rollup.config.sdk-dts.mjs
